title: deyeuxia sylvatica var. inaequata
intro: Deyeuxia sylvatica var. inaequata, also known as the grassy woodsedge, is a plant species within the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Deyeuxia sylvatica var. inaequata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, including wounds and infections. Deyeuxia sylvatica var. inaequata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
